parameters.subject: Reset your Sim2Real password
parameters.text: ={{ 'Click this link to reset your password: ' + $json.resetUrl }}
parameters.html:
=

Hello,

You requested a password reset for your Sim2Real account.

Click here to reset your password

This link expires in 1 hour.

If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.

parameters.responseBody: ={"success": true, "message": "Password reset email sent. Check your inbox."}
